message:
fix(reconstruct): trim agent names and drop blank entries during recipients_json sync

The sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json() function now trims
whitespace from agent names via TRIM() in the ORDER BY clause and
passes each name through normalized_archive_agent_name() to skip
blank/whitespace-only entries. This prevents recipients_json from
containing entries like "  " or empty strings that would confuse
downstream rendering.

Adds secondary sort by TRIM(a.name) COLLATE NOCASE for deterministic
ordering when names differ only by whitespace.

Test: sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json_trims_and_drops_blank_names
verifies that "  Bob  " becomes "Bob" and "   " is dropped entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
